rationale: Russian strikes on Kyiv continue without qualitative escalation toward Poland; oil price decline from US-Iran deal persists as background trend. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill 11 and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Ongoing Russian bombardment of Ukraine continues with no new spillover risk for Poland. Pattern is established; no qualitative escalation toward NATO territory.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Continued oil price decline modestly benefits Polish consumers and businesses through lower energy costs, but this trend is already priced into daily life.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A major UK-Japan trade and investment deal has limited direct impact on Poland, though it signals continued Western economic alignment that indirectly supports EU stability.
